metadata.description: Environment name (dev, staging, prod)
Container image tag

Enable authentication (Entra ID). Defaults to false so the template can deploy without a pre-existing Entra app registration; set to true and supply entraClientId/entraClientSecret/entraTenantId to turn auth on.
Microsoft Entra ID Application (client) ID
Microsoft Entra ID client secret
Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID
Allow public access to PostgreSQL and AI Services for dev/debugging
Developer IP address to allow when allowDevAccess is true (e.g. 1.2.3.4)
IP range to restrict container app ingress (CIDR notation, e.g. 1.2.3.0/24). Empty = no restriction.
PostgreSQL server name. Must be globally unique in Azure. 3-63 chars, lowercase letters/digits/hyphens, start with a letter. Leave empty to auto-generate: psql-magnet-ai-<env>-<suffix>.
AI Services (Cognitive Services) account name. Must be globally unique in Azure. 2-64 chars, alphanumeric + hyphens. Leave empty to auto-generate: ai-magnet-ai-<env>-<suffix>.
PostgreSQL admin password. 8+ chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special char. Provide the same value on redeploy to avoid regeneration.
Fernet encryption key (44-char base64url string ending with =). Provide the same value on redeploy to avoid regeneration.
Load default data (providers, models, agents, etc.) on first deployment. Set to true only for initial setup, then set back to false.
Environment name (dev, staging, prod)
Azure region for all resources
VNet resource ID
Container Apps subnet resource ID
Private Endpoints subnet resource ID
VNet resource ID to link DNS zones to
Private DNS zone ID for PostgreSQL
Private DNS zone ID for Cognitive Services
Private DNS zone ID for OpenAI
Private DNS zone ID for AI Services
Environment name (dev, staging, prod)

Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Customer ID (workspace ID) for log analytics configuration

Subnet resource ID for private endpoints
Private DNS zone resource ID for Cognitive Services (privatelink.cognitiveservices.azure.com)
Private DNS zone resource ID for OpenAI (privatelink.openai.azure.com)
Private DNS zone resource ID for AI Services (privatelink.services.ai.azure.com)
Allow public access for dev/debugging (adds devIpAddress to networkAcls)
Developer IP address to allow when allowDevAccess is true
AI Services account name (globally unique). Override if default is taken.
